title: SeSaM-Craft
description: Want to get a refreshing and vibrant minecraft vanilla experience? You want to build the biggest factories and conquer the world by plane/train/ship. No problem, you've come to the right place!
body:
!!!Important: If your PC does not have the Power deactivate the Shaders, Distant Horizons!!!



Want to get a refreshing and vibrant minecraft vanilla experience? You want to build the biggest factories and conquer the world by plane/train/ship. No problem, you've come to the right place!
A short list of the biggest Mods for an Improofed Envirorment:
- Critters and Companions
- Ambient Environment
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Dynamic Surroundings
- Camps. Castles. Carriages.
- Geophilic
- Naturalist
- Ribbits
- Spawn
- Verdant

A short List of some Create and othe Conveniant Mods:

- Farmer's Delight
- Chipped
- Create
- Create Crafts and Additions
- Create Steam and Rails
- Create Decor
- Small Ships
- Immersive Aircraft
- Macaw's Furniture
- Distant Horizons
- NiftyCarts
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Storage Drawers

And of course the are a lot of Performanc Mods like Sodium, Indium and Lithium to delliver you the best Gamplay wit or without Shaders and Distant Horizons.

This is just a Modpack and all Credits tu the Modpack Owners.
